case_title: MARIA ISABELA BUSTAMANTE MADRIZ VS. ARENDONDO'S AUTO SALES

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE $80.00 SERVED MAR-08-2016, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ARENDONDO'S AUTO SALES

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JUL-12-2016 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JUL-12-2016 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF MARIA ISABELA BUSTAMANTE MADRIZ. NO APPEARANCE BY DEFENDANT ARENDONDO'S AUTO SALES. RUBEN CORNEJO WAS PLACED UNDER OATH AND SERVED AS SPANISH SPEAKING INTERPRETER FOR MS. MADRIZ. PROOF OF SERVICE IN THE FILE. EXHIBITS NOT RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: K. DOUGHERTY. NOT REPORTED. (D506).
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF MADRIZ, MARIA ISABELA BUSTAMANTE
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF JUL-12-2016 - JUDGMENT.
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $8,500.00 FILED BY MADRIZ, MARIA ISABELA BUSTAMANTE AS TO DEFENDANT ARENDONDO'S AUTO SALES ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR MAY-03-2016 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 506

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF MADRIZ, MARIA ISABELA BUSTAMANTE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ARENDONDO'S AUTO SALES $4,582.37 PRINCIPAL, $155.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $4,737.37 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF MAY-03-2016 - CONTINUED PER REQUEST OF PLAINTIFF TO JUL-12-2016 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. PLAINTIFF'S FRIEND/CLIENT JIM REILLY APPEARED FOR PLAINTIFF AND REQUESTED A CONTINUANCE DUE TO A FAMILY EMERGENCY. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: J. BERTELSEN. NOT REPORTED. (506)
